title: Vendor Adapter
description: Defines how to transform an assembled AGENTS.md into a vendor-specific format

base.description: Base output path relative to the target project root

skills.description: Path where skills are deployed (if vendor supports skills)

section_mappings.description: Maps AGENTS.md H2 headings to vendor output files

agents_md_heading.description: H2 heading in the assembled AGENTS.md (e.g. '## TypeScript')

activation_mode.description: How the vendor activates this rule

frontmatter.description: Vendor-specific frontmatter to prepend to the output file

unsupported_sections.description: AGENTS.md H2 headings this vendor cannot represent

character_limit_per_file.description: Character limit per output file (null = no limit)

total_character_limit.description: Total character limit across all output files (null = no limit)

notes.description: Human-readable notes about this vendor's adapter
